label: Environment IoT Bridge v2
info: Role 4: city/+/air (env sensor) + city/+/vehicle (IR counter) → API Gateway

name: Transform env → /api/environment/sensor
Handle env response
func: const status = msg.statusCode;if (status === 201 || status === 200) {node.log('[ENV OK] ' + JSON.stringify(msg.payload.data ? msg.payload.data.zone : msg.payload));} else if (status === 401) {node.warn('[ENV] Token invalid/expired, force refresh & re-queue.');flow.set('iot_token_exp', 0); // paksa refresh di cek berikutnyaflow.set('pendingEnvQueue', (flow.get('pendingEnvQueue') || []).concat([msg.payload]));} else if (status === 429) {node.warn('[ENV RATE LIMIT] Antrian lokal.');flow.set('pendingEnvQueue', (flow.get('pendingEnvQueue') || []).concat([msg.payload]));} else {node.error('[ENV ERROR ' + status + '] ' + JSON.stringify(msg.payload));flow.set('pendingEnvQueue', (flow.get('pendingEnvQueue') || []).concat([msg.payload]));}return msg;

name: Transform vehicle → /api/environment/vehicle
Handle vehicle response
func: const status = msg.statusCode;if (status === 201 || status === 200) {node.log('[VEHICLE OK] ' + JSON.stringify(msg.payload.data ? msg.payload.data.zone : msg.payload));} else if (status === 401) {node.warn('[VEHICLE] Token invalid/expired, force refresh & re-queue.');flow.set('iot_token_exp', 0); // paksa refresh di cek berikutnyaflow.set('pendingVehicleQueue', (flow.get('pendingVehicleQueue') || []).concat([msg.payload]));} else if (status === 429) {node.warn('[VEHICLE RATE LIMIT] Antrian lokal.');flow.set('pendingVehicleQueue', (flow.get('pendingVehicleQueue') || []).concat([msg.payload]));} else {node.error('[VEHICLE ERROR ' + status + '] ' + JSON.stringify(msg.payload));flow.set('pendingVehicleQueue', (flow.get('pendingVehicleQueue') || []).concat([msg.payload]));}return msg;

name: Flush ENV queue
Flush VEHICLE queue
Cek token masih valid?
Build request /oauth/token
Simpan token ke flow context
